message:
fix(notifications): cap predictive warning severity by confidence level

Previously, a prediction with 1% confidence but 3 minutes remaining
would fire as Critical. Now severity is capped based on confidence:
- <30% confidence → capped at Info (suppressed)
- <50% confidence → capped at Warning
- <70% confidence → capped at Orange
- >=70% confidence → no cap

The final level is min(time_based, confidence_cap), preventing
low-confidence predictions from generating CRIT notification spam.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
